spec_talents.description:
Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis.

 Void Metamorphosis
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.
spec_talents.name: Void Metamorphosis

spec_talents.description: Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 8 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
spec_talents.name: Feast of Souls

spec_talents.description:
While in Void Metamorphosis, every 30 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star.

 Collapsing Star
Channel an immense amount of void energy into a single, cataclysmic blast, critically striking for 43,774 Cosmic damage to your target and 33,445 Cosmic damage to all nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While casting Collapsing Star, your Fury drain is significantly reduced.

Generates 3 Soul Fragments.
spec_talents.name: Collapsing Star

spec_talents.description: After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to 6 additional Soul Fragments.
spec_talents.name: Moment of Craving

spec_talents.description:
While in combat, generate 1 Soul Fragment every 12 sec.

While out of combat, you will slowly build towards your Void Metamorphosis, up to 25 Soul Fragments.
spec_talents.name: Entropy

spec_talents.description: Damage from Void Ray has a 200% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.
spec_talents.name: Waste Not

spec_talents.description: Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by 8%.
spec_talents.name: Soulshaper

spec_talents.description:

spec_talents.description:
Fully channeling Void Ray upgrades your Reap to Eradicate.

 Eradicate
Slam your Scythe to the ground, dealing 29,814 Cosmic damage to your primary target and 29,814 to all other enemies within a 25 yd cone in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Eradicate gathers up to 4 nearby souls.

spec_nodes.description:
Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis.

 Void Metamorphosis
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

Violently slash your scythe around you, dealing 940 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies and generating 10 Fury. Shatters up to 2 Soul Fragments from nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hungering Slash grants a temporary charge of Vengeful Retreat and causes your next Vengeful Retreat within 6 sec to deal an additional 570 Cosmic damage.
